creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
There's a more specific LLVM bug for this particular issue (strip: error: Link field value 33 in section .rela.plt is not a symbol table), and see the comment at https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/53948#issuecomment-1518486410

My guess is that we're using binutils in science/q's build, but because of PR 270663 we use the system's strip.

Assuming that is the issue this could get fixed via one of two paths:
a) New binutils port picks up the fix above
b) If we can fix PR 270663 then GNU strip would get used instead
